metadata.description: Shared AI Skills by Development Seed

plugins.name: github-issue-to-markdown
plugins.description: Exports GitHub Issues to structured Markdown using the gh CLI

plugins.name: veda-story-creator
plugins.description: Generates VEDA scrollytelling story MDX files with satellite data visualizations

plugins.name: devseed-poster
plugins.description: Creates Development Seed conference posters as self-contained HTML files — design system, layout patterns, QR codes, and PDF export

plugins.name: setup-python-repo
plugins.description: Scaffold CI/CD, linting, and dependency automation for a Python project using GitHub Actions

plugins.name: claude-vault-capture
plugins.description: Automatically captures Claude Code sessions into an Obsidian vault on SessionEnd (scrub → summarize → write), plus a /vault-save skill for on-demand exports
